name: Arimoclomol inclusion body myositis randomized trial
summary: A multicenter randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial of arimoclomol for inclusion body myositis.
population: Adults with sporadic inclusion body myositis

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Chaperone and Heat-Shock Support because they can show whether the intervention changes function and safety in Adults with sporadic inclusion body myositis. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
